sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا حِمَايَةُ مَعْلُومَاتِنَا الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عَلَى الْإِنْتَرْنِت.
sentences.translation: Moramo zaštititi naše lične podatke na internetu.
sentences.translationEn: We must protect our personal information on the internet.

sentences.arabic: لَا تُشَارِكْ كَلِمَةَ الْمُرُورِ الْخَاصَّةَ بِكَ مَعَ الْغُرَبَاءِ أَبَدًا.
sentences.translation: Nikada ne dijeli svoju lozinku sa strancima.
sentences.translationEn: Never share your password with strangers.

sentences.arabic: بَعْضُ التَّطْبِيقَاتِ تَطْلُبُ الْوُصُولَ إِلَى مَوْقِعِكَ الْجُغْرَافِيِّ بِدُونِ حَاجَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Neke aplikacije traže pristup tvojoj geografskoj lokaciji bez potrebe.
sentences.translationEn: Some applications request access to your geographical location without need.

sentences.arabic: اقْرَأْ شُرُوطَ الْخُصُوصِيَّةِ جَيِّدًا قَبْلَ الِاشْتِرَاكِ فِي أَيِّ مَوْقِعٍ.
sentences.translation: Dobro pročitaj uslove privatnosti prije prijave na bilo koju stranicu.
sentences.translationEn: Read the privacy terms well before signing up for any site.
